common.tagline: Lifting our community through sport and solidarity.

home.heroSubtitle: Changing lives through football, education and community action.
home.missionDescription: We build opportunities for young people and families through sport, mentoring and local partnerships.
home.pillar1Body: Free access to training and equipment for children from underserved communities.
home.pillar2Body: Programs that pair physical activity with academic support and personal growth.
home.pillar3Body: Events, tournaments and actions that bring people together around shared values.
home.ctaJoinBody: Donate, volunteer or sponsor a project — every gesture matters.

whoWeAre.title: Who we are
whoWeAre.intro: We are an association using sport as a tool for social change.
whoWeAre.storyBody: Full content will be added from the admin dashboard.

whatWeDo.title: What we do
whatWeDo.intro: Our programs connect young people, communities and local partners.

getInvolved.title: Get involved
getInvolved.intro: Donate, volunteer or become a partner.
getInvolved.volunteerBody: Join our volunteer team for events and ongoing programs.
getInvolved.sponsorBody: Support our programs through a dedicated partnership.
getInvolved.newsletterBody: Get monthly stories, news and event invitations.
getInvolved.donateBody: Our bank account details will be displayed here.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.intro: Football is the engine of our community — see past tournaments and what's coming next.

cookies.message: We use essential cookies for the site to function. Continuing to browse implies acceptance.

forms.name: Name
forms.interests: How would you like to get involved?
forms.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
forms.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.

volunteer.success: Thanks! We'll get in touch shortly.

sponsor.success: Thanks! We'll get back to you soon.

newsletter.success: Check your inbox to confirm your subscription.

teamRegistration.title: Register your team
teamRegistration.intro: Fill in the form to enter this tournament.
teamRegistration.success: Thanks! Your registration will be reviewed by the organizers.
teamRegistration.registerIntro: Registrations remain open until the organizers confirm the bracket.

newsletterStatus.unsubscribed: You've been unsubscribed. Sorry to see you go.
